tls_transport.remediation_action: Configure Let's Encrypt automated solver and bind TLS 1.3 protocol limits in NGINX config
tls_transport.closure_criteria: Active listener responds exclusively to TLS 1.3 HTTPS handshakes on port 443 with trusted certs
validation_steps: 1. Deploy NGINX reverse-proxy sidecar in GKE pod namespace
2. Execute `openssl s_client -connect <host>:443 -tls1_3` to verify secure handshake
3. Execute `openssl s_client -connect <host>:443 -tls1_2` to verify rejection of outdated TLS versions

authn_authz.remediation_action: Replace OIDC mock validate claims in auth_adapter.py with public Google Cloud JWKS validations
authn_authz.closure_criteria: API rejects tokens lacking matching cryptographic key signatures or invalid issuer claims
validation_steps: 2. Submit HTTP request with expired token, check for 401 response
3. Submit HTTP request with valid OIDC token, check for 200 response

audit_ledger.remediation_action: Provision Cloud SQL PostgreSQL DB and point AuditLedgerHelper connections to PostgreSQL schemas
audit_ledger.closure_criteria: All write transactions write successfully to PostgreSQL with secure IAM service account bindings
validation_steps: 1. Provision db instance using terraform configs
2. Run database migration task creating audit_ledger tables
3. Run integration script recording 100 sequential events, verify counts in DB console

mutation_safety.remediation_action: Integrate Redis cache for nonce storage and validate dual-operator signatures in MutationGate
mutation_safety.closure_criteria: Replay mutation payloads throw cryptographic exception, rejecting secondary executions
validation_steps: 1. Send mutation event with signed nonce token
2. Attempt to resend identical payload within 5 seconds, verify 403 replay block

supply_chain.remediation_action: Enable GKE Binary Authorization policies in Kubernetes production cluster mappings
supply_chain.closure_criteria: GKE blocks scheduling of pods utilizing container images without valid Cosign signatures
validation_steps: 1. Attempt to deploy unsigned test image, verify scheduler returns validation error
2. Attempt to deploy signed release image, verify successful scheduling

observability.remediation_action: Apply Istio/Envoy authorization policies blocking external ingress traffic on metrics endpoints
observability.closure_criteria: Metrics endpoint `/metrics` returns 403 Forbidden to external IP addresses, open to internal Prometheus scraper
validation_steps: 1. Send curl request to `/metrics` from external IP, verify blocked
2. Send curl request from internal scraper container, verify metrics payload returns

backup_recovery.remediation_action: Write automated pg_dump scripts and cron schedules testing database restores weekly
backup_recovery.closure_criteria: Nightly dumps are verified on staging database clones with zero table integrity errors
validation_steps: 2. Check that return code matches 0 and verify logs show database status ok

compliance.remediation_action: Configure CI/CD pipelines compiling signed release provenance bundles automatically on merge
compliance.closure_criteria: Provenance jsonl generated, signed with cosign key, and pushed to GCS bucket for ATO packages
validation_steps: 2. Verify artifacts `provenance.intoto.jsonl.sig` exists in release repository bucket
